General.Name: Hon Kwok Land Investment Co Ltd
General.Description: Hon Kwok Land Investment Company, Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the property development, investment, and related activities in Hong Kong, Mainland China, and Japan. It operates in three segments: Property Development; Property Investment; and Property, Carpark Management, and Others. The company's properties include commercial/office buildings, hotels, serviced apartments, data centres, and residential buildings. It also provides management services for residential and commercial properties; car park management; and nominee, financing, and money lending services. In addition, the company is involved in property holding and letting, project management, and sub-leasing of car parking activities. The company was incorporated in 1965 and is based in Central, Hong Kong. Hon Kwok Land Investment Company, Limited is a subsidiary of Chinney Investments, Limited.
General.Address: Wing On Centre, Central, Hong Kong
